mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, circle_id, weight, interaction_count, created_at, updated_at FROM user_circle_preference WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY weight DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_circle_preference (user_id, circle_id, weight, interaction_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{circleId}, #{weight}, #{interactionCount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE weight = VALUES(weight), interaction_count = interaction_count + 1
